introduction:
Following the 'Digital Rajasthan' vision, obtaining a driver's card requires obtaining a Learner's Licence (LL) first and progressing to the Permanent Driving Licence (DL) thereafter.

Citizens can leverage Parivahan to clear out most prerequisites including online exams minimizing tedious visits.
quickFacts:
Crucial Path
  • LL Test Phase: Open for all via Aadhaar authentication to take the quiz from your web browser.
  • DL Test Phase: Booking allowed after 30 days. RTO test handles physical navigation tests.
  • Validity generally caps around 20 years or attaining the age of 40 (whichever comes first for LMV category).
documentsRequired:
Documents Required

For Learner's Licence (LL)
  • Aadhaar/Voter ID Card
  • Age Proof Certificate (Class X document valid)
  • Medical declaration form Signature
For Permanent DL
  • Original Printed Learner's Licence
  • Application Form 4 Check
  • Fee Receipt Print
  • Form 1-A (for those >40 yrs)
onlineApplication:
How to Apply Online

Stage A: Extract your e-LL
  1. Browse sarathi.parivahan.gov.in picking Rajasthan.
  2. Opt for "Apply for Learner Licence" making sure Aadhaar is used for quick processing.
  3. Process application files, snap clear photos for DL printing, and pay LL tax.
  4. Survive the online traffic curriculum quiz and pull your digitally signed LL permit locally to your device.
Stage B: Secure your physical DL
  1. Wait out the 30-day minimum duration.
  2. Select "Apply for Driving Licence".
  3. Push LL info. Settle test assessment plus dispatch duties online.
  4. Reserve your Rajasthan RTO Driving Test date.
offlineApplication:
How to Apply Offline / Driving Test

Testing cannot be avoided to ensure street capability:

  1. Deploy at the RTO compound promptly mapping your test slot hours.
  2. Ensure your motorcycle, moped, or four-wheeler checks technical norms exactly including the L indicators.
  3. Navigate successfully demonstrating smooth transitions before the authority.
afterApplying: Once Approved: Successful candidates secure their digital locker footprint concurrently. Smart Cards subsequently exit the press facility tracking toward postal routes within roughly standard operational weeks.
helpfulLinks: MoRTH Sarathi Portal Rajasthan Transport Dept
